# Hugin Formation

**Summary**: A sedimentary formation in the North Sea.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023]] studied the Hugin Formation to characterize its lithofacies and porosity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation consists of shallow marine siliciclastic sandstone deposited during the Middle to Late Jurassic. ([[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023, p. 26]])
